content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://law.stanford.edu/publications/no-85-the-eus-digital-services-act-and-its-impact-on-online-platforms/", "source_title": "No. 85: The EU's Digital Services Act and Its Impact on Online ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Abolish: How Europe's Digital Services Act Threatens Free Speech and Faith Worldwide ## Before the United States House of Representatives ##...", "direct_quote": "Abolish: How Europe's Digital Services Act Threatens Free Speech and Faith Worldwide ## Before the United States House of Representatives ## Committee on the Judiciary September 3, 2025 Hearing on Europe's Threat to American Speech and Innovation ## ", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "If after the investigation, the Commission finds that a service provider has made insufficient commitments to enforcing the DSA, it may impo...", "direct_quote": "If after the investigation, the Commission finds that a service provider has made insufficient commitments to enforcing the DSA, it may impose fines up to 6% of the total worldwide annual revenue.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "If this persists, the Commission can restrict EU access to the platform or suspend operations.", "direct_quote": "If this persists, the Commission can restrict EU access to the platform or suspend operations.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
